frontMatter.title: Simple State Machine
frontMatter.summary: After reading a bunch of unidirectional data flow, Cycle.js's MVI and this article about implementing MVI in Android by Hannes, I'm convinced that this is how I should write my code from now on.

prev.title: A Model for Your View
prev.summary: Not so long ago, on my Android's MVP architecture, my view layer does not have a model. The view only renders what the presenter tell them to do which is good because then, we have a passive view. But, there's no representation of the view itself.

next.title: Simple REST API with Adonis JS
next.summary: On the last ADB meetup, we have a conversation about what framework we usually use in creating a REST API. Then, Adonis.Js is being mentioned. I know Adonis but haven't got a chance to test it, so let's test it now!
